title: Most expensive ticket ever? World Cup final seat listed for $11.5 million despite being one of the worst in stadium
summary_full: A standard ticket for the 2026 FIFA World Cup final at FIFA World Cup 2026 Final has appeared on the resale market for an extraordinary $11.5 million, despite offering no premium benefits. The pricing surge at MetLife Stadium highlights escalating concerns over affordability and speculation, as global demand for the expanded tournament intensifies ahead of its North American showcase.
